posts.author: LeedsWatch_84
posts.text: Has anyone seen this clip circulating? It shows footage from St Jude's General allegedly covering up an emergency procedure last night. The audio is a bit garbled but they claim the hospital 'hid' it to protect their reputation. There's a link to the full video on their page. #LeedsNews #HospitalScandal
posts.explanation: This requires specialist verification as a manipulated-looking clip alleging an emergency concealment.
